feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Antman reached the S.S. Anne Captain's cabin after proving Rocket tampered with the cargo manifest.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: The Captain confirmed the lower-deck waterline was sabotage, not ordinary seasickness.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Trail Cutter registered as Antman's first field tool. It replaces Cut without taking a team move slot.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red marked Trail Cutter as the first real proof that this journey is bigger than old HM errands.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Lt. Surge gym access unlocked. Vermilion's power sabotage thread can now move forward.
